site.description: Mobile RSS reader with personalized categories, infinite loading and quick news sharing.
home.title: Your mobile RSS reader
home.description: Choose your favorite categories and read the latest news in a fast, clear, mobile-first front page.
reader.app.name: RSS Reader
reader.hero.title: Latest news
reader.hero.description: Fast headlines, reachable categories and saved stories for later.
reader.setup.title: Choose what you want to read
reader.setup.description: Select at least one category. Your choice will be saved on this device so your personal front page opens directly.
reader.menu.title: Explore news
reader.menu.myCategoriesDescription: Your saved categories grouped so you can filter your front page quickly.
reader.menu.mySourcesDescription: Sources from your saved categories, excluding sources you chose to ignore.
reader.tabs.label: Reader sections
reader.mine.title: For you
reader.mine.description: Recent news from the categories you saved.
reader.all.title: All
reader.all.description: Latest news from every available RSS source.
reader.saved.title: Saved
reader.saved.description: Stories you marked to read or share later.
reader.settings.title: Add or remove categories
reader.settings.description: Change your favorite topics and mark sources from those categories that you do not want to see.
reader.settings.hint: Select categories, choose ignored sources and save to update your front page.
reader.ignoredSources.title: Ignored sources
reader.ignoredSources.description: Select sources from the chosen categories that you prefer to hide from the reader.
reader.ignoredSources.label: Sources I do not want to see
reader.ignoredSources.empty: Select a category to see the sources you can ignore.
reader.empty.mine: There is no news for your categories yet. Try adding more in Settings.
reader.empty.all: News could not be loaded right now.
reader.empty.saved: You have not saved stories yet. Use the Save button on any headline.
reader.shareError: The story could not be shared.
reader.errorLoading: News could not be loaded. Try again later.
reader.noMoreNews: No more news is available right now.
sources.title: Sources by category
sources.description: Browse every available RSS source grouped by the reader's generic categories.
sources.searchPlaceholder: Search by source, URL or category…
sourceDetail.title: RSS source
sourceDetail.description: Latest news, categories and feed URL for an RSS source.
sourceDetail.error: This source could not be loaded.
sourceDetail.emptyNews: There are no recent stories from this source.
sourceDetail.statusIgnored: Source ignored. It will not appear in the reader.
sourceDetail.statusFollowed: Source followed. It will appear in the reader again.
categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Browse the reader's generic categories and how many RSS sources each one contains.
reset.title: Clear reader data
reset.description: This page clears preferences, saved stories, session data, browser cache and service workers so the reader can start from scratch.
notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist, has moved or has not been created yet.
